_publications._publicationTitle: A Systematic Assessment of Accuracy in Detecting Somatic Mosaic Variants by Deep Amplicon Sequencing: Application to NF2 Gene.

_contextSnippet: Low-coverage regions represented a total of 467 bp (8.4% of target regions); however, the majority of them matched to intronic or UTR regions (346 bp, 75% of low-coverage regions)
details: Low-coverage regions represented 8.4% of target regions (467 bp), with majority (75%) in intronic or UTR regions characterized by high GC content
